name: altbyte-plugins
description: AltByte's open-source Claude Code / Cowork plugins.

plugins.name: personal-data-protection
plugins.description: SEA personal-data-protection compliance reference for engineers — Singapore PDPA, Thailand PDPA, Indonesia UU PDP, Malaysia PDPA (with the 2024 Amendments — Act A1727), and Philippines Data Privacy Act (RA 10173). Tech-agnostic, organised by where in the stack each obligation lands rather than by statute section. Reference material, not legal advice.
